# Data Model Checklist: Show Top Contributing Factors

**Purpose**: Validate data model requirements completeness and alignment with the feature spec.
**Created**: 2026-03-10
**Feature**: `/home/ayra/ECE_493/Capstone-Test-Repo/specs/015-top-contributing-factors/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are all data items listed in the spec explicitly defined with fields and types? [Completeness, Spec §Data Involved]
- [x] CHK002 Are fields defined for factor labels, measured values, impact direction, and magnitude format? [Completeness, Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [x] CHK003 Are fields defined for qualitative explanations, missing categories, and policy filtering? [Completeness, Spec §Alternate Flows]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK004 Are constraints for top-N ordering and tie-breaking represented? [Clarity, Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [x] CHK005 Is determinism across repeated requests represented in the model or metadata? [Clarity, Spec §Functional Requirements]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK006 Do acceptance scenarios and functional requirements agree on factor ordering and units consistency? [Consistency, Spec §Acceptance Scenarios, Spec §Functional Requirements]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK007 Are data representations defined for explainability service failure outcomes? [Coverage, Spec §Alternate Flows]
